name: Corrosion Inhibitors
description: Valtrix manufactures vapor-phase (VCI) corrosion inhibitors, solvent-de-watering rust preventive fluids, and oil-soluble concentrates.

specs.label: VCI Dispersion Range
specs.value: Effective within a 30cm radius of open metal surface

specs.label: Protection Duration
specs.value: Up to 24 months in enclosed storage environments

specs.label: Salt Spray Performance
specs.value: >48 hours (ASTM B117) on carbon steel test panels

calloutNote: Need a completely bio-degradable, water-soluble corrosion inhibitor? Valtrix manufactures zero-VOC organic corrosion preventatives suitable for closed-loop cooling towers.
